mapper.insert: INSERT INTO employees (emp_no, name, name_kana, birth_date, join_date, dept_code, position, assign_date, inspection_rank, inspection_cert_date, inspection_cert_expire, login_id, password_hash, is_locked) VALUES (#{empNo}, #{name}, #{nameKana}, #{birthDate}, #{joinDate}, #{deptCode}, #{position}, #{assignDate}, #{inspectionRank}, #{inspectionCertDate}, #{inspectionCertExpire}, #{loginId}, #{passwordHash}, #{isLocked})
mapper.update: UPDATE employees SET name = #{name}, name_kana = #{nameKana}, birth_date = #{birthDate}, join_date = #{joinDate}, dept_code = #{deptCode}, position = #{position}, assign_date = #{assignDate}, inspection_rank = #{inspectionRank}, inspection_cert_date = #{inspectionCertDate}, inspection_cert_expire = #{inspectionCertExpire}, login_id = #{loginId}, is_locked = #{isLocked}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE emp_no = #{empNo}
